title: Gate motor maintenance improves safety, extends lifespan
description: PROPERTY NEWS - The correct maintenance of...
bodyHtml: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PROPERTY NEWS - The correct maintenance of gate motors is crucial for safety, reliability and long-term performance.","html":"PROPERTY NEWS - The correct maintenance of gate motors is crucial for safety, reliability and long-term performance."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Follow these safety guidelines when maintaining your gate motor:"},{"type":"list","items":["Switch off the power supply before cleaning, inspecting or repairing any motor components;","Clear the gate path of stones, overgrowth and any obstacles that could block the motor’s movement;","Inspect the gate arms and wheels for damage and check for rust on the chain;","Lubricate moving parts such as gears and chains with the correct gate lubricant to ensure smooth operation.","Regularly test all the safety features to ensure they work correctly;","Store remotes and keypads in a safe place;","Familiarise yourself with the manual release mechanism in case of power outages;","Ensure the gate cannot be easily lifted off its rails;","Monitor the battery’s health, particularly during frequent load-shedding, as it might require replacement earlier than the usual two to three years."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By following these steps, you can extend the lifespan of your gate motor and reduce the risk of malfunction or accidents.","html":"By following these steps, you can extend the lifespan of your gate motor and reduce the risk of malfunction or accidents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Gate motor maintenance improves safety, extends lifespan
